description: Master the art of frying with this lesson.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients: oil, vegetables, and seasonings.
Heat the oil in a frying pan over medium heat.
Add the vegetables to the hot oil carefully.
Stir occasionally to ensure even cooking.
Cook until the vegetables are golden brown.
Remove from heat and drain excess oil.

safety_tips: Always be cautious of hot oil to prevent burns.
Use a splatter guard to minimize mess.
Keep a fire extinguisher nearby when frying.
